scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.copy-plugin: mkdir -p "/Users/stoller/Documents/Obsidian/Plugin Dev Vault/.obsidian/plugins/jzs_scan" && cp manifest.json styles.css node_modules/@techstark/opencv-js/dist/opencv.js "/Users/stoller/Documents/Obsidian/Plugin Dev Vault/.obsidian/plugins/jzs_scan/"
scripts.build-and-copy: npm run build && npm run copy-plugin
